headline: Delta's SkyMiles Ranked World's Most Valuable Airline Loyalty Program at $31 Billion
summary: Delta Air Lines' SkyMiles has been ranked the world's most valuable airline loyalty program, with an estimated valuation of more than USD 31 billion, according to the latest On Point Loyalty Top 100 Most Valuable Airline Loyalty Programs 2026 report.

content.title: Delta's SkyMiles Ranked World's Most Valuable Airline Loyalty Program at $31 Billion
content.summary: Delta Air Lines' SkyMiles has been ranked the world's most valuable airline loyalty program, with an estimated valuation of more than USD 31 billion, according to the latest On Point Loyalty Top 100 Most Valuable Airline Loyalty Programs 2026 report.

headline: Amazon, Delta team up for in-flight Wi-Fi, challenging Musk's Starlink
summary: By Joey Roulette CAPE CANAVERAL, March 31 (Reuters) - Amazon's Leo satellite internet unit signed a deal with Delta Air Lines to provide in-flight Wi-Fi on 500 of the airline's planes starting in 2028

content.title: Amazon, Delta team up for in-flight Wi-Fi, challenging Musk's Starlink
content.summary: By Joey Roulette CAPE CANAVERAL, March 31 (Reuters) - Amazon's Leo satellite internet unit signed a deal with Delta Air Lines to provide in-flight Wi-Fi on 500 of the airline's planes starting in 2028

thumbnail.caption: The logo of Amazon is seen at the company's logistics center in Bretigny-sur-Orge, near Paris, France, November 28, 2025. REUTERS/Stephanie Lecocq

headline: Delta to Tap Amazon Satellite-Internet Service for In-Flight Wi-Fi
summary: Amazon’s Leo service will start connecting a portion of Delta’s fleet in 2028; Elon Musk’s Starlink has become a dominant satellite connectivity provider to airlines.

content.title: Delta to Tap Amazon Satellite-Internet Service for In-Flight Wi-Fi

headline: Delta Resources to Attend NWOPA 2026 Showcase in Thunder Bay
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - March 31, 2026) - Delta Resources Limited (TSXV: DLTA) (OTC Pink: DTARF) (FSE: 6GO1) ("Delta" or "the Company") is pleased to announce that it will be attending the Northwest Ontario Prospectors Association ("NWOPA") Showcase, taking place April 8-9, 2026, at the Valhalla Inn in Thunder Bay, Ontario.The NWOPA Showcase is a key annual gathering for prospectors, exploration companies, investors, and industry stakeholders, focused on advancing mineral exploration

headline: Amazon Taps Satellites And OpenAI Deal As Service Revenue Drivers
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has secured a major in-flight Wi-Fi contract for its Leo satellite network with Delta Air Lines, marking its first flagship U.S. airline deal. Amazon and OpenAI announced a multi-billion dollar partnership in which Amazon plans to invest US$50b in OpenAI. OpenAI plans to spend US$138b on AWS cloud services over eight years as part of the agreement. For investors following Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN), these moves highlight how the company is leaning on its satellite...
